title: [Goal] Canvas integration
description:
## Tasks

- [x] **#g016#t01**: Shadow-clone tiny-canvas repo
  Generated conceptual plan + 2 technical plans (canvas package internals + storyboard integration strategy) in .github/plans/tiny-canvas/
- [x] **#g016#t02**: Canvas data plugin, routing, and widget components (Phase 1+2)
  Added .canvas.json support to data plugin, route generation, CanvasPage, useCanvas hook, 4 widget types (Component, StickyNote, MarkdownBlock, PrototypeEmbed), widget registry. Build passes, 518 tests pass.
- [x] **#g016#t03**: Canvas server persistence, workshop feature, Viewfinder, toolbar (Phase 3-5)
  Canvas CRUD API, debounced persistence, createCanvas workshop feature, Viewfinder integration with canvas entries, CanvasToolbar for adding widgets. Build passes, 518 tests pass.
- [x] **#g016#t04**: Move canvases to src/canvases/ with /canvas/* routes
  Canvas files now live in src/canvases/ (peer directory to src/prototypes/). All routes prefixed with /canvas/. Server creates files in the right location.
- [x] **#g016#t05**: Fix dual React crash and canvas route stripping
  Fixed useRef null crash from dual React instances via Vite dedupe. Fixed .folder segments not being stripped from canvas routes.

---
_Managed by clips • Goal ID: #g016_
